raw:
{
  "review_id": "rev-20260512-001",
  "status": "approved_with_notes",
  "strengths": [
    "Explicitly enforces synthetic-only boundaries with no real data or external actions.",
    "Focuses on foundational forensic principles (chain of custody, write-blocking) without requiring physical hardware.",
    "Clear safety boundaries prevent accidental exposure to production environments."
  ],
  "risks": [
    "Abstract checklist design may lack practical validation steps for trainees.",
    "Absence of specific synthetic artifact examples might lead to vague implementation of 'non-modification controls'."
  ],
  "improvement": "Include a sample synthetic YAML snippet demonstrating a valid 'write-blocking' configuration entry to clarify expected output format."
}
